title: rubus pinetanus
intro: Rubus pinetanus, also known as the Pine Bramble or Pine Raspberry, is a species of bramble native to China. The medicinal properties of Rubus pinetanus include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce swelling. The health benefits of consuming Rubus pinetanus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. Rubus pinetanus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to be consumed or applied topically for its medicinal properties.
